Keywords: local react-router vite css-modules admin dashboard workspace
Description: Design and implement for React 19, React Router v7, CSS Modules, and semantic tokens.
Do: Start from the existing stack and local primitives.
Don't: Assume Tailwind or shadcn/ui is the default baseline.
Code Bad: Add Tailwind utilities or shadcn patterns as the default.

Keywords: theme tokens color palette semantic variables light dark
Description: Consume CSS custom properties from packages/ui tokens.
Do: Use var(--color-*) and related semantic variables.
Don't: Hardcode raw colors in business components or feature CSS.

Guideline: Keep tokens in the token layer
Keywords: tokens colors palette design-system
Description: Raw palette values belong in token definitions.
Do: Change packages/ui tokens when the system needs a new color.
Don't: Scatter hex values across page CSS modules.

Guideline: Prefer CSS Modules for app UI
Keywords: css-modules page feature component styling
Description: Local page and feature styling should use CSS Modules.
Do: Create Foo.module.css and bind classes.
Don't: Build page styling out of large inline style objects.

Keywords: shared ui button input card modal empty-state storybook
Description: Shared primitives should come from the shared UI package first.
Do: Use Button, Input, Card, EmptyState, and Modal from @real-demo/ui when they fit.
Don't: Rebuild common primitives inside every page or feature.
Code Bad: Create a one-off button primitive inside a page.

Keywords: sdk api request query chat skills spaces users
Description: Frontend transport should go through @real-demo/sdk.
Do: Wrap server access in sdk hooks or entity adapters.
Don't: Call random endpoints with fetch in page code.

Guideline: Keep server state in TanStack Query
Keywords: tanstack-query server-state caching invalidation list detail
Description: Server-backed data belongs in query hooks and entity adapters.
Do: Use query hooks and invalidation.
Don't: Store API payloads in Zustand stores.

Guideline: Use Zustand only for local UI state
Keywords: zustand local ui state theme popover panel
Description: Zustand is for theme and local interaction state, not server data.
Do: Store UI preference or transient panel state.
Don't: Store lists or detail payloads from the server.

Keywords: fsd pages widgets features entities shared admin dashboard route
Description: Pick the right layer before implementing.
Do: Put route assembly in pages and workflows in features.
Don't: Drop business logic into shared or route pages.

Keywords: shared generic utilities business imports semantics
Description: shared should not grow business-specific imports or semantics.
Do: Place domain behavior in features or entities.
Don't: Hide business rules in shared helpers.

Keywords: form labels inputs textarea dialog settings admin
Description: Inputs and textareas need labels or equivalent accessible names.
Do: Keep <label> or aria-label wired.
Don't: Use placeholder as the only cue.

Keywords: focus keyboard navigation outline accessibility
Description: Interactive elements need readable focus treatment.
Do: Use token-based outlines and focus styles.
Don't: Remove outlines without replacement.

Keywords: dialog modal title description radix focus
Description: Modal and dialog surfaces need accessible titles and descriptions.
Do: Provide title text for dialog components.
Don't: Render dialog content without a title.

Guideline: Design explicit loading empty error states
Keywords: loading empty error skeleton spinner request feedback
Description: User feedback should be readable without color alone.
Do: Add clear states for async surfaces.
Don't: Leave blank areas while data loads.

Keywords: i18n locales en zh translation copy
Description: All copy must land in en.ts and zh.ts together.
Do: Add keys to both locale files.
Don't: Ship new UI text in only one language.

Keywords: light dark theme semantic variables
Description: Token-based theming should work in both theme modes.
Do: Use semantic variables that flip by theme.
Don't: Special-case theme colors in component logic.

Guideline: Use MSW for frontend request mocking
Keywords: msw frontend test mocking vitest
Description: Frontend tests should mock transport at the network boundary.
Do: Use MSW handlers and Testing Library.
Don't: Stub fetch ad hoc in every test.

Guideline: Build Storybook for shared UI changes
Keywords: storybook shared ui primitives visual regression
Description: packages/ui changes should consider Storybook regressions.
Do: Run Storybook build when primitives change.
Don't: Skip UI verification for shared component changes.

Keywords: motion animation transition hover page-load
Description: Prefer a few meaningful motions tied to hierarchy and state.
Do: Animate opacity, transform, and staged reveals.
Don't: Add noisy motion everywhere.

Guideline: Adapt search results to local constraints
Keywords: local stack constraints repo rules
Description: Search output is inspiration and guidance, not a drop-in implementation.
Do: Translate results into the repo's primitives and tokens.
Don't: Copy generic framework snippets verbatim into apps/web.
Code Bad: Drop raw html-tailwind snippet into apps/web
